confidenceLevels.strong: At least 150 leagues plus a clear top lean.
confidenceLevels.medium: At least 100 leagues plus a useful top lean or separation.
confidenceLevels.directional: At least 50 leagues, usable as a soft prior.
confidenceLevels.thin: At least 20 leagues, show only with caution.

notes: Prioritize elite QB access early when the tier is available.
